About Us

Who We Are

Paathshala Classes is a trusted coaching institute covering both Science Ki Paathshala and Commerce Ki Paathshala. With a network of branches across Navi Mumbai, we bring quality education close to every student's doorstep — making learning accessible, engaging and results-driven.

Expert & Experienced Faculty

Subject specialists with a passion for simplifying complex concepts and mentoring students holistically.

Beyond Academics — Events & Activities

Science exhibitions, celebrations and student events that build confidence and teamwork.

Regular Tests & Performance Tracking

Continuous assessments keep students exam-ready and motivated throughout the year.

🏢 Our Branches

New Panvel Kharghar Kamothe Nerul Akola

What We Offer

Our Courses & Programs

Comprehensive coaching designed to build strong fundamentals and exam-winning strategies.

📖

Classes 6th – 8th

Building a rock-solid foundation across all subjects. Interactive methods to spark curiosity and confidence from an early stage.

MathematicsScienceEnglishSocial StudiesLanguages
🏆

Classes 9th – 10th

Critical SSC board exam preparation with intensive practice, mock tests and targeted revision sessions for top results.

SSC BoardMathsScienceLanguages
🔬

11th – 12th Science

In-depth coaching for Physics, Chemistry, Biology and Maths with focus on HSC board and competitive exam readiness.

PhysicsChemistryBiologyMaths
📊

11th – 12th Commerce

Concept-driven approach to Accountancy, Economics, Business Studies and OC for HSC Commerce students.

AccountancyEconomicsBusiness StudiesOC

Meet the Visionaries

Our Founder & Co-Founder

The driving force behind Paathshala Classes — two passionate educators who turned a dream into a thriving institution.

⭐ Founder
Saurabh Sir
Founder – Paathshala Classes

The visionary behind Paathshala Classes, Saurabh Sir built this institution from the ground up with a simple but powerful belief — every student deserves quality education delivered with passion. With expertise in Science and a gift for making complex topics approachable, he has mentored hundreds of students to board exam success and beyond.

Science Mathematics Student Mentoring Academic Strategy
🌟 Co-Founder
Mahira Ma'am
Co-Founder – Paathshala Classes

An award-winning educator and the heart of Commerce Ki Paathshala, Mahira Ma'am brings unmatched dedication and warmth to every classroom. Recognized as an Most Inspiring Woman, she leads Commerce education with clarity, empathy and a drive to help every student realise their potential — academically and personally.

Commerce Accountancy Economics Student Wellbeing
🏆
AWARD RECOGNITION Most Inspiring Woman Award — celebrated educator & community leader
